signals.author: U_SEHBA
signals.text: Hey @brian — CKO sign-off is still blocked. We're waiting on your approval of the clearing-file format before Checkout.com can countersign. This is now in the way of the Wave 2 onboarding milestone, and the team can't move forward without it. Can we get this resolved today?

signals.author: U_BRIAN
signals.text: Acknowledged — reviewing the clearing-file template now. Will get back to you by EOD.

signals.author: U_NEHA
signals.text: Standup notes: FX desk discussed sprint capacity. Nothing concrete to flag.
